Event Organizer

We create
moments that
matter.

From intimate celebrations to large-scale corporate gatherings — we bring ideas to life with precision, taste, and heart.

What we do

Events built on trust, creativity, and attention to detail.

We don't just organize events — we design experiences. Every detail is intentional, every moment is considered, and every celebration tells a story.

01

Private Parties

Birthday celebrations, engagement parties, anniversaries — designed around your personality and style.

02

Prom & Gala Nights

Themed proms and gala dinners that leave a lasting impression with impeccable production.

03

Corporate Events

Team building retreats, product launches, and company milestones — professional, memorable, seamless.

04

Custom Concepts

Have something unique in mind? We collaborate with you to craft a one-of-a-kind experience.

How we work

Dari ide menjadi
kenyataan.

Proses kami dirancang agar Anda bisa menikmati perjalanan merencanakan acara — tanpa stres, tanpa ribet.

01

Konsultasi

Kami mendengarkan ide, keinginan, dan ekspektasi Anda secara mendetail. Dari tema, budget, hingga jumlah tamu — semuanya kita bahas bersama.

02

Perencanaan & Konsep

Tim kreatif kami merancang konsep acara yang sesuai dengan visi Anda — termasuk desain venue, rundown, dekorasi, dan kebutuhan teknis.

03

Persiapan & Koordinasi

Kami mengurus semua vendor, perizinan, dan detail logistik. Anda tinggal duduk santai sementara kami bekerja di balik layar.

04

Hari-H & Eksekusi

Tim kami hadir di lapangan memastikan setiap momen berjalan lancar dan sesuai rencana — dari awal hingga akhir.

Testimonials

Apa kata mereka.

“WTP benar-benar mewujudkan prom night impian kami. Dari dekorasi, lighting, hingga musik — semuanya sempurna. Anak-anak sangat senang!”

Ibu Sarah

Panitia Prom Night SMA 7

“Acara gathering tahunan perusahaan kami berjalan lancar tanpa hambatan. Tim WTP sangat profesional dan detail-oriented. Highly recommended!”

Budi Hartono

HR Director, PT Maju Bersama

“Birthday party anak saya jadi yang paling berkesan! Tema dan dekorasinya persis seperti yang kami bayangkan. Terima kasih WTP!”

Diana Putri

Klien Private Party

About us

The team behind
your best moments.

WTP was founded with one belief: every event should feel personal. We're a team of planners, designers, and coordinators who care deeply about the details — from the first conversation to the final farewell.

Whether it's a 30-person birthday or a 500-guest corporate gala, we bring the same level of dedication, creativity, and professionalism to every project.

200+

Events Completed

50+

Corporate Clients

98%

Client Satisfaction

FAQ

Pertanyaan yang sering ditanyakan.

Belum menemukan jawaban? Hubungi kami langsung — kami senang berdiskusi.

Let's work together

Have an event
in mind?

Tell us about your vision and we'll make it happen. Every great event starts with a conversation.
